user.title: Add Bluetooth Mesh Device
user.description:
Enter your device's Bluetooth address and choose what type it is.

Factory defaults work for most new devices — expand **Advanced options** only if needed.

data_description.mac_address: The Bluetooth address printed on your device (format: XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX).
data_description.mesh_name: The name of your mesh network. Leave as default if unsure.
data_description.mesh_password: The password of your mesh network. Leave as default if unsure.
data_description.vendor_id: Manufacturer identifier in hex. Only change if instructed.
data_description.mesh_address: Internal network address. Set to 0 to assign automatically.

sig_bridge.title: Connect to Bluetooth Bridge
sig_bridge.description: Enter the network address of the bridge that connects to **{name}**.

data_description.bridge_host: The IP address or hostname of your Bluetooth bridge (e.g. your Raspberry Pi).
data_description.bridge_port: Port the bridge is listening on. Default is 8099.
data_description.unicast_target: Internal mesh address of the device. Only change if instructed.

telink_bridge.title: Connect to Bluetooth Bridge
telink_bridge.description: Enter the network address of the bridge that connects to **{name}**.

data_description.bridge_host: The IP address or hostname of your Bluetooth bridge (e.g. your Raspberry Pi).
data_description.bridge_port: Port the bridge is listening on. Default is 8099.

sig_plug.title: Setting Up {name}
sig_plug.description:
We'll automatically set up the secure connection to your device.

Make sure the device is **powered on** and **close to your Bluetooth adapter**, then click **Submit**.

confirm.title: Device Found: {name}

reauth_confirm.title: Update Connection Credentials
reauth_confirm.description: Your device stopped responding. Please re-enter the connection details to reconnect.

error.invalid_mac: That doesn't look like a valid Bluetooth address. Expected format: XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.invalid_key: Invalid key — we need exactly 32 hex characters.
error.invalid_bridge_host: Please enter a hostname or IP address (not a URL). Loopback addresses are not allowed.
error.invalid_credential_length: Network name and password must each be 16 characters or fewer.
error.invalid_vendor_id: Invalid vendor code — use 1 to 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x1001).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge. Check that it's powered on and connected to your network.
error.provisioning_failed: Setup failed. Make sure the device is powered on and close to your Bluetooth adapter, then try again. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This device is already set up in Home Assistant.
abort.reauth_successful: Credentials updated. Reconnecting your device now.

init.title: Device Settings
init.description: Update connection settings for this device.

data_description.mesh_name: The name of your mesh network.
data_description.mesh_password: The password of your mesh network.
data_description.mesh_address: Internal address of this device. Set to 0 to use the default.
data_description.bridge_host: The IP address or hostname of your Bluetooth bridge.
data_description.bridge_port: Port the bridge is listening on. Default is 8099.
data_description.unicast_target: Internal mesh address of the target device. Only change if instructed.
data_description.iv_index: Mesh security IV index. Only change if instructed.

command_timeout.message: No response from {device}. It may be out of range.

identify.name: Flash device
identify.description: Flash the device's indicator light to help you identify it.

set_log_level.name: Set log detail
set_log_level.description: Change how much diagnostic detail is logged for Bluetooth mesh. No restart required.

level.name: Level
level.description: Amount of detail: debug (most), info, warning, or error (least).

get_diagnostics.name: Get device info
get_diagnostics.description: Retrieve connection statistics and health information for a device.

provisioning_failed.title: Device setup failed
provisioning_failed.description: Could not set up {device}. Power the device off and on again, then re-add it to Home Assistant.

bridge_unreachable.title: Bridge not responding
bridge_unreachable.description: Cannot reach the Bluetooth bridge at {host}:{port}. Check that it's powered on and connected to your network.
